main.text1: Some might say that 60 seconds is not enough time to get what you need.
main.second:
seconds is perfect
if what you need is
main.risk: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment.

support-mail.text:
We know how important it is to be able to talk to someone when you need help.
It’s even better if that person can speak your language.
Literally.
That’s why IQ Option offers Customer Support 24/7 in 13 languages.
support-mail.asterisk: *30 seconds is the average wait time for a customer to get a reply from a Support Team member when using Live Chat.
